'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=4eOiYmnunPxF8hgfBS6s4cBp.zu2DkOi1cyKHEioA4Y-1773718148-1.0.1.1-EaJqbp1jSBm7aoXpIBtdo6V4BAa8En.nMx1d6Hrli_0"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
